title: helianthemum marifolium subsp. frigidulum
intro: Helianthemum marifolium subsp. frigidulum, also known as rockrose, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the family Cistaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as wound healing, anti-aging, and antioxidant effects, as well as potentially reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of rockrose, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
